    Bhaskar Bhaumik

    AI Innovation Leader at TCS. Builder of AI Rapid Build Camps. Enterprise Data & Analytics Architect.

    • Atlanta, Georgia, USA
    • LinkedIn
    • GitHub
    • Hugging Face

    Resume

    ⬇ Download PDF 🖨 Print LinkedIn Profile →

    Career Summary

    25+ years building Data & AI capabilities for enterprise organizations across Retail, Telecom, Healthcare, Travel & Hospitality, and CPG. Managing Consultant, AI & ST — Tata Consultancy Services, Atlanta, Georgia.

    Current Role

    Director, AI Solutions & Rapid Build Camps (Apr 2025 – Present) AI & Services Transformation — Tata Consultancy Services, Americas

    Leading billable AI Innovation Camps and Rapid Build practices. Composable accelerators targeting 50%+ improvement in AI MVP delivery velocity.

    Previous Roles

    Head, AI Innovation Americas / Head, AI & Data (Retail Americas) (2022–2025) Tata Consultancy Services

    P&L ownership ~$25M; grew portfolio 50%+ in 3 years. Led 200+ member team transformation to AI-first model. Drove Agentic AI and GenAI pursuits across healthcare, engineering, and technology sectors.

    Consulting Director, Data & Analytics (2019–2022) Tata Consultancy Services — Atlanta, Georgia

    D&A strategy consulting at CXO/ELT level. Led transformations at Macy’s, Advance Auto Parts, and Genuine Parts Company. GCP AI/ML platform delivery.

    Consulting Director, Data & Analytics (2015–2019) Tata Consultancy Services — Atlanta, Georgia

    Enterprise-scale D&A solutions architecture, cloud migration, and self-serve BI platform design.

    Technical Architect & Program Manager (2005–2015) Tata Consultancy Services — Atlanta, Georgia

    Architected enterprise EDW, data integration, and BI systems. Established the D&A COE at The Home Depot.

    Systems Engineer → Technical Lead (1999–2005) Tata Consultancy Services — Cardiff, Wales, UK & Chennai, India

    Developer, designer, and tester on enterprise data warehouse and billing systems for British Telecommunications plc.

    Education

    • MBA — Georgia Institute of Technology (2021)
    • M.Stat — Indian Statistical Institute, Kolkata (1999) · Statistical Quality Control & Operations Research
    • B.Stat (Honors) — Indian Statistical Institute, Kolkata (1997)
